ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist performing the song */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the song in popularity */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "artist_featured" TEXT /* Featured artists on the song, if any */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song (0-11) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song in BPM */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song has explicit content */,
  "duration_min" REAL /* Duration of the song in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the song */,
  "cover_art" TEXT /* URL or path to the song's cover art */,
  "song_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the song */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_base" TEXT /* Base location of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the artist was born */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lyric entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song the lyrics belong to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the lyrics */,
  "lyric_writer" TEXT /* Name of the person who wrote the lyrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song attribute entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song (0-11) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo in BPM */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_attributes_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the popularity score is recorded */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song on that date */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Music platform where the popularity score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade_name" TEXT /* Name of the decade (e.g., 1960s) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the decade */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_stats" (
  "word_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word stat entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "num_words" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the song lyrics */,
  "words_per_sec" REAL /* Words per second in the song */,
  "num_uniq_words" INTEGER /* Number of unique words in the song */,
  "uniq_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of unique words to total words */,
  "avg_word_length" REAL /* Average length of words in the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_stats_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketer, admin) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the song */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., play, download) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the song (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Pop, Rock) */,
  "parent_genre" TEXT /* Parent genre of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song-genre association */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_genres_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-song association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user giving feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
